_meta._note: Mercury is a banking API (no GL/CoA). Charter primitive #4 (account-mapping fallback) is n/a — we only push payment instructions. Schema covers the three write endpoints CoreFlux uses: sweeps, funding pulls, vendor disbursements. Companion: tools/refresh_mercury_spec.sh.

PaymentCreate.description: POST /api/v1/account/{id}/transactions — minimum body for an ACH/wire payment instruction

RecipientCreate.description: POST /api/v1/recipients — minimum body for a new payment counterparty

RoutingInfo.description: ABA routing + account number for ACH/wire recipients
